recap:
- The Knowledge Assistant with Agent Bricks enables management of AI outcomes instead of manual engineering of components.
- It utilizes a declarative approach to deploy Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems quickly, leveraging enterprise data.
- Agent Bricks automates model selection and retrieval parameter settings to optimize cost and quality.
- The system features an integrated architecture that automatically orchestrates Unity Catalog Volumes, ai_parse_document, and Vector Search.
- Continuous improvement is facilitated through the Review App and Agent Learning from Human Feedback (ALHF), allowing expert feedback to enhance the system.
